description: Pack an unpacked XML directory back into a .pptx: runs the PPTX schema validator with auto-repair (when an original is supplied), condenses XML whitespace, and writes a ZIP-packed .pptx. The output .pptx lands under record_store.
rules: requires defusedxml (XML condensing) and lxml (XSD validation); degrades gracefully when absent
validation+auto-repair runs only when an --original .pptx is provided; set ORIGINAL_PPTX or leave empty to skip
the rebuilt .pptx is written to output.pptx under record_store; the pack/validation report is captured to pack.log
usage: Set UNPACKED_DIR (an edited unpacked tree). Optionally set ORIGINAL_PPTX for validation. Output: output.pptx plus pack.log.
limitation: Operates on an already-unpacked directory (run unpack + edits first). Validation is skipped without an original; condensing fails fast on malformed XML.
